---
title: Voting Statistics
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

data_raw = readxl::read_xlsx("whiteboardpollresults.xlsx")

vote_totals = data_raw %>%
  group_by(question) %>%
  summarise(q_total = sum(votes))

data = left_join(data_raw, vote_totals, by = "question") %>%
  mutate(vote_share = round( (votes/q_total) * 100, 2))

pollsasked = length(unique(data$question))
votescounted = sum(data$votes)
mostvoted = unique((data %>% filter(votes == max(data$votes)))$option)
mostvotes = max(data$votes)
mostunanimous = unique((data %>% filter(vote_share == max(data$vote_share)))$option)
mostunanimous_pct = max(data$vote_share)
```

***`r pollsasked`*** polls conducted

***`r votescounted`*** votes counted

Highest vote count: ***`r mostvotes`*** for ***`r mostvoted`***

Most unanimous: ***`r mostunanimous`*** with ***`r mostunanimous_pct`*** % of the votes
